items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Unsurprisingly, no real “news” from Onsi Saleh’s pre-draft media availability today.

He was buttoned-up as usual, lots of references to ATL’s optionality/flexibility, praise for McCollum as he returns, etc.

I’ll post full audio on Patreon shortly.
